seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is a 42-year-old female
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient presents for right index finger pain after a skiing injury
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient injured her finger while skiing downhill on a double black diamond run
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The finger injury occurred on Saturday about five days before the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient jammed her right index finger during the skiing fall
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports right index finger pain rated 7 out of 10
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports no other injuries from the skiing fall
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has chronic constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient takes Miralax for chronic constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Miralax seems effective for the patient's constipation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient had an appendectomy at age seven
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient took ibuprofen for the finger pain without significant relief
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not iced the injured finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not used a splint on the injured finger prior to this visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Right hand x-ray shows normal alignment of joints and bones
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Right hand x-ray shows no fractures
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has tenderness when the clinician presses on the right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician pulls on the right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician squeezes over the right index finger joint
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has pain when the clinician squeezes another area of the right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician diagnoses a sprain of the distal interphalangeal (DIP) joint of the right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to place a splint on the patient's right index finger
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician prescribes Mobic 15 mg once daily for the finger injury
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician will prescribe 14 tablets of Mobic 15 mg
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans for the patient to return in two weeks for follow-up of the finger sprain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: At the two-week follow-up, the clinician will consider starting hand therapy if needed
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
